Simulator.load: Loading from '/home/xwiki/Documents/fac/GECCO_Robot_Body/Disertatie/framspy/deterministic.sim'
Loader.load: Comments read from file follow:
Loader.load:  Parameter values that make the evaluation of a Framsticks creature deterministic.
Loader.load:  The values turn off random noise, so evaluation of the same genotype will always yield the same performance.
Loader.load:  The advantage is that you do not need to evaluate a genotype many times, and performance values are reliable.
Loader.load:  The disadvantage is that evolved creatures are "overfitting", i.e. rely entirely on the specific environment,
Loader.load:  and their behavior may be different in any other environment or (even slightly) changed conditions or parameter values,
Loader.load:  so each creature evolved using these settings must be later inspected using exactly the same setup.
Loader.load: 
Loader.load:  Before loading this file, load base settings, e.g. "eval-allcriteria.sim".
Loader.load:  Put this file in the "data" subdirectory within the Framsticks distribution.

Simulator.load: Loading from '/home/xwiki/Documents/fac/GECCO_Robot_Body/Disertatie/framspy/recording-body-coords.sim'
Loader.load: Comments read from file follow:
Loader.load:  The recording of the "center of gravity" (or mass) of all Parts of a creature during its lifespan, and
Loader.load:  the recording of coordinates of all Parts are stored as data->bodyrecording.
Loader.load:  Use STORE_ALL_PART_COORDS below to decide how much data you need recorded - maybe only COG and no Parts.
Loader.load: 
Loader.load:  If STORE_ALL_PART_COORDS=0 below, only COG is stored and the format is
Loader.load:  [ [cog1x,cog1y,cog1z], [cog2x,cog2y,cog2z], [cog3x,cog3y,cog3z], ...]
Loader.load:  where index numbers in the names are simulation steps.
Loader.load:  So you get a vector of COG x,y,z coordinates repeated for every simulation step.
Loader.load: 
Loader.load:  If STORE_ALL_PART_COORDS=1 below, the format is more verbose with one more level of nesting, because after the COG,
Loader.load:  the list of coordinates of all Parts follows (the first index in the names below is the simulation step, the second one is Part number)
Loader.load:  [ [[cog1x,cog1y,cog1z], [p1_1x,p1_1y,p1_1z], [p1_2x,p1_2y,p1_2z], ...], ...]
Loader.load: 
Loader.load:  You can further limit the amount of stored data by recording coordinates less frequently - see onCreaturesStep() comment below.
Loader.load:  Adjust 'Energy0' to achieve the lifespan you need.
Loader.load:  'evalcount' should likely be 1 unless you need other performance criteria (like vertpos or distance) averaged from multiple evaluations.
Loader.load:  Put this file in the "data" subdirectory within the Framsticks distribution unless you prefer to provide its path when loading.
